title: Sudden Weakness - Acute Ischemic Stroke
chief_complaint: Sudden right-sided weakness and difficulty speaking for 2 hours

physical_exam.neuro: Right hemiparesis 3/5, expressive aphasia, right facial droop, NIHSS: 12

hidden_data.ct_head: No acute hemorrhage, hyperdense left MCA sign
hidden_data.ct_angiogram: Occlusion of left MCA M1 segment

correct_diagnosis: Acute Ischemic Stroke - Left MCA Territory
key_learning_points: Time is brain - 1.9 million neurons lost per minute

patient_responses.symptoms_start: His wife says he was fine at breakfast, then suddenly couldn't move his right arm
patient_responses.past_history: He has high blood pressure and diabetes, not on blood thinners

hints.imaging: CT first to rule out hemorrhage
